dotnet.name: check_csharp_all
dotnet.description: Aggregate tool that runs all enabled C# source-code checkers and returns a single combined report. Covers code style, member ordering, naming conventions, async patterns, nullable context, project structure, and test style.

features.name: check_csharp_async_patterns
features.description: Enforces async/await rules from dotnet-async-await.instructions.md: no async void (except event handlers), public async APIs require a CancellationToken parameter, and all await expressions in non-test code must use .ConfigureAwait(false).

features.name: check_csharp_coding_style
features.description: Enforces code style rules from lang-csharp.instructions.md: regions, decorative comments, curly braces, blank lines before control flow, expression-body arrow placement, XML doc comments on public/protected members, System-directive ordering, and expression-body style for methods and properties.

features.name: check_csharp_member_ordering
features.description: Enforces member ordering rules from lang-csharp.instructions.md: members are ordered by kind, access level, and static-before-instance.

features.name: check_csharp_naming_conventions
features.description: Enforces naming conventions from lang-csharp.instructions.md and dotnet-coding-standards.instructions.md: interface I prefix, extension class Extensions suffix, async method Async suffix, private instance field _camelCase, PascalCase for types/methods/properties/events, and camelCase for parameters.

features.name: check_csharp_nullable_context
features.description: Enforces nullable safety rules from lang-csharp.instructions.md: no #nullable disable directives, and no use of the null-forgiving (!) operator to suppress warnings.

features.name: check_csharp_project_structure
features.description: Enforces project structure rules from dotnet-coding-standards.instructions.md: file-scoped namespaces, single type per file, file name matches type name, and no #pragma warning disable.

features.name: check_csharp_test_style
features.description: Enforces test style rules from testing.instructions.md and dotnet-xunit.instructions.md: test class naming, test method naming, no XML doc comments, Assert.Multiple for multi-assertion tests, no ConfigureAwait, and structure mirroring (file name, namespace) against the production project.

dotnet.name: check_nuget_hygiene
dotnet.description: Enforces NuGet hygiene rules from dotnet-nuget.instructions.md: no duplicate references, no floating versions, no missing versions (unless Central Package Management), and flags packages that have well-known built-in .NET alternatives.
